title: Assistant Store Manager - HomeTown Global Group - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - HomeTown Global Group - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
HomeTown Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About HomeTown Global Group:
HomeTown Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown Global Group!
